segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: Hello?
segments.zh: 喂？

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Oh hello.
segments.zh: 哦，你好。我想找杰克·菲茨杰拉德，关于租一间小屋的事。

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: I was hoping to speak to Jack Fitzgerald about renting a cottage.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: I'm his wife, Shirley, and we own the cottages together, so I'm sure I can help you.
segments.zh: 我是他妻子雪莉，我们共同拥有这些小屋，所以我想我能帮你。

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Great.
segments.zh: 太好了。我叫汤姆。去年我们的一些朋友从你们那里租了谷仓小屋，他们觉得非常棒。所以我和妻子希望五月份来住一周。

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: My name's Tom.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Some friends of ours rented Granary Cottage from you last year, and they thought it was great.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: So my wife and I are hoping to come in May for a week.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: What date did you have in mind?
segments.zh: 你心里想的是哪个日期？

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: The week beginning the 14th, if possible.
segments.zh: 如果可能的话，从14号开始的那一周。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: I'll just check ...
segments.zh: 我查一下……对不起，汤姆，那一周已经订出去了。不过从28号开始的那一周是空的，可以住七个晚上。实际上，那是五月份唯一能租到的时间。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: I'm sorry, Tom, it's already booked that week.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: It's free the week beginning the 28th, though, for seven nights.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: In fact, that's the only time you could have it in May.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Oh.
segments.zh: 哦。嗯，我想我们可以安排。只需要调整几件事。费用是多少？

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Well, we could manage that, I think.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: We'd just need to change a couple of things.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: How much would it cost?

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: That's the beginning of high season, so it'd be £550 for the week.
segments.zh: 那是旺季刚开始，所以一周要550英镑。

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Ah.
segments.zh: 啊，恐怕这比我们想付的要多一点。我们住宿的预算是500英镑。

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: That's a bit more than we wanted to pay, I'm afraid.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: We've budgeted up to £500 for accommodation.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: Well, we've just finished converting another building into a cottage, which we're calling Cherwil Cottage.
segments.zh: 嗯，我们刚把另一栋楼改造成了一个小别墅，叫Cherwil Cottage。

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Sorry?
segments.zh: 抱歉？你刚才说什么？

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: What was that again?

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: Chervil.
segments.zh: Chervil。C-H-E-R-V for Victor I-L。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: C-H-E-R-V for Victor I-L.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Oh, that's a herb, isn't it?
segments.zh: 哦，那是一种香草，对吧？

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 没错。它在这附近长得挺野的。你想要的那一周可以480英镑租到。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: It grows fairly wild around here.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: You could have that for the week you want for £480.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。那你能给我介绍一下它的情况吗？

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: So could you tell me something about it, please?

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: Of course.
segments.zh: 当然。这栋建筑原本是车库，比谷仓小屋要小一点。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: The building was built as a garage.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: It's a little smaller than Granary Cottage.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: So that must sleep two people, as well?
segments.zh: 那它应该也能睡两个人吧？

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 没错，有一间双人卧室。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: There's a double bedroom.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Does it have a garden?
segments.zh: 有花园吗？

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: Yes, you get to it from the living room through French doors, and we provide two deckchairs.
segments.zh: 有的，从客厅通过法式门可以到花园，我们提供了两把折叠躺椅。我们希望在不久的将来建一个露台，但我不敢保证五月前能完工。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: We hope to build a patio in the near future, but I wouldn't like to guarantee it'll be finished by May.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: The front door opens onto the old farmyard, and parking isn't a problem – there's plenty of room at the front for that.
segments.zh: 前门通向旧农场庭院，停车不是问题——前面有足够的空间。那里还有一些树木和盆栽植物。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: There are some trees and potted plants there.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: What about facilities in the cottage?
segments.zh: 小屋里的设施怎么样？我想应该有炉灶和冰箱这些标准配置吧？

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: It has standard things like a cooker and fridge, I presume?

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: In the kitchen area there's a fridge-freezer and we've just put in an electric cooker.
segments.zh: 厨房区域有一台冰箱冰柜，我们刚装了一台电炉。

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Is there a washing machine?
segments.zh: 有洗衣机吗？

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: Yes.
segments.zh: 有的。客厅里还有一台电视，也能放DVD。浴室太小放不下浴缸，所以装了淋浴。我觉得现在很多人反而更喜欢淋浴。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: There's also a TV in the living room, which plays DVDs too.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: The bathroom is too small for a bath, so there's a shower instead.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: I think a lot of people prefer that nowadays, anyway.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: It's more environmentally friendly, isn't it?
segments.zh: 这样更环保，不是吗？除非你在里面待半天！

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Unless you spend half the day in it!

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: Exactly.
segments.zh: 没错。

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: What about heating?
segments.zh: 供暖怎么样？那个季节有时候挺凉的。

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: It sometimes gets quite cool at that time of year.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: There's central heating, and if you want to light a fire, there's a stove.
segments.zh: 有中央供暖，如果你想生火的话，还有一个炉子。我们可以提供你需要的所有木柴。烧木柴比烧煤好闻多了，而且让房间很温馨——我们自己家里就有一个。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: We can provide all the wood you need for it.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: It smells so much nicer than coal, and it makes the room very cosy – we've got one in our own house.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: That sounds very pleasant.
segments.zh: 听起来很惬意。也许我们应该冬天来，好好享受一下！

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Perhaps we should come in the winter, to make the most of it!

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: Yes, we find we don't want to go out when we've got the fire burning.
segments.zh: 是的，我们发现生着火的时候就不想出门了。小屋周围还有一些不错的景色，我之前没提过。有一座著名的石桥——是这一带最古老的桥之一，从客厅就能看到。离得不远。卧室窗户朝向另一边，可以看到山丘和山顶的纪念碑，景色很美。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: There are some attractive views from the cottage, which I haven't mentioned.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: There's a famous stone bridge – it's one of the oldest in the region, and you can see it from the living room.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: It isn't far away.

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: The bedroom window looks in the opposite direction, and has a lovely view of the hills and the monument at the top.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Well, that all sounds perfect.
segments.zh: 嗯，听起来太完美了。我想预订，需要付定金吗？

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: I'd like to book it, please.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Would you want a deposit?

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: Yes, we ask for thirty percent to secure your booking, so that'll be, um, £144.
segments.zh: 是的，我们需要支付30%来确认预订，那就是144英镑。

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: And when would you like the rest of the money?
segments.zh: 那剩下的钱什么时候付呢？

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: You're coming in May, so the last day of March, please.
segments.zh: 您是五月份来，所以请在3月底前付清。

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.en: Fine.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: Excellent.
segments.zh: 太好了。我能记一下您的信息吗……

segments.speaker: SHIRLEY
segments.en: Could I just take your details ...

segments.speaker: CHAIRPERSON
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。接下来议程上是交通和公路问题。桑顿议员。

segments.speaker: CHAIRPERSON
segments.en: Next on the agenda we have traffic and highways.

segments.speaker: CHAIRPERSON
segments.en: Councillor Thornton.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: Thank you.
segments.zh: 谢谢。好了，我们现在有了上个月关于镇上交通和道路运输的调查结果。人们对道路状况普遍满意。有一两个关于坑洼的投诉会得到处理，但相当多的人抱怨重型车辆越来越多，它们为了避开别处的交通而使用我们本地的道路。我们原本预计通勤者会对火车服务减少有更多投诉，但似乎对人们影响不大。自从去年路面改善后，沿河的自行车道被骑车人和行人很好地利用，但超车可能是个问题，所以我们打算在旁边加宽一点。在某个阶段，我们想延长这条道，让它一直穿过城镇，但这不会在近期实现。在邮局旁边设置人行横道的计划不幸地暂时搁置了。我们原本预算在本财年完成这项工作，但当时有传言说邮局要搬走，那就意味着其实不需要横道了。现在他们确认会留在原址，但公路部门告诉我们，在我们最初计划的地方设置人行横道会很危险，因为那里有个弯道。所以这需要再考虑一下。在车站路靠近车站和道口的地方，如果道口关闭，司机可能会面临相当长的等待，我们现在已经竖起了标志，要求他们那时不要空转发动机。这意味着在人行道上等待过铁路的行人不必吸入汽车尾气。我们遇到了一些问题，骑车人把自行车锁在售票处外的栏杆上，但车站已经同意在那里提供自行车架。

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: Well, we now have the results of the survey carried out last month about traffic and road transport in the town.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: People were generally satisfied with the state of the roads.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: There were one or two complaints about potholes which will be addressed, but a significant number of people complained about the increasing number of heavy vehicles using our local roads to avoid traffic elsewhere.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: We'd expected more complaints by commuters about the reduction in the train service, but it doesn't seem to have affected people too much.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: The cycle path that runs alongside the river is very well used by both cyclists and pedestrians since the surface was improved last year, but overtaking can be a problem so we're going to add a bit on the side to make it wider.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: At some stage, we'd like to extend the path so that it goes all the way through the town, but that won't be happening in the immediate future.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: The plans to have a pedestrian crossing next to the Post Office have unfortunately had to be put on hold for the time being.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: We'd budgeted for this to be done this financial year, but then there were rumours that the Post Office was going to move, which would have meant there wasn't really a need for a crossing.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: Now they've confirmed that they're staying where they are, but the Highways Department have told us that it would be dangerous to have a pedestrian crossing where we'd originally planned it as there's a bend in the road there.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: So that'll need some more thought.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: On Station Road near the station and level crossing, drivers can face quite long waits if the level crossing's closed, and we've now got signs up requesting them not to leave their engines running at that time.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: This means pedestrians waiting on the pavement to cross the railway line don't have to breathe in car fumes.

segments.speaker: COUNCILLOR THORNTON
segments.en: We've had some problems with cyclists leaving their bikes chained to the railings outside the ticket office, but the station has agreed to provide bike racks there.

pairs.note: available 和 free 都表示'空闲的、可用的'
原文直接给出了具体日期 28th，替换了题干中的 1 May

paraphrase.explain: 题干问五月初开始的周是否可用，原文说五月初那周已订满，但28号开始的周是空闲的，因此答案就是28th。

pairs.note: 原文直接说'£550 for the week'，与题干'cost for the week'对应，数字就是答案。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句直接提到'£550 for the week'，与题干'cost for the week'完全匹配，数字550即为答案。

pairs.note: 原文中直接出现cottage，与题干相同。
原文中cottage前的名字Cherwil即为填空答案，注意拼写与题干中Cottage一致。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'converting another building into a cottage, which we're calling Cherwil Cottage'，其中Cherwil Cottage直接对应题干中的________ Cottage，因此答案就是Cherwil。

pairs.note: 原文用'built as'表示最初用途，对应题干'originally'
原词重现，直接定位
原文'was built as a'对应题干'was a'，表示存在状态

paraphrase.explain: 定位句直接说'The building was built as a garage'，其中'built as'对应题干'originally'，'building'原词重现，'was built as a'对应'was a'，答案garage直接出现。

items.prompt: walk through doors from living room into a 5 ________

pairs.q: walk through doors from living room into a
pairs.note: 原文直接问'Does it have a garden?'，答案就是garden。

paraphrase.explain: 题干描述从客厅穿过门进入一个地方，原文直接问是否有花园，因此答案就是garden。

pairs.note: several 和 plenty of 都表示数量多，但 several 更具体，plenty of 强调充足。
spaces 和 room 在这里都指空间，是同义替换。
完全相同的短语，直接定位。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问前面有几个什么空间，原文说前面有充足的空间用于停车，所以答案就是 parking。

items.prompt: central heating and stove that burns 7 ________

pairs.note: 题干中的stove在原文中直接出现，但原文没有直接说burns什么，需要从后面找燃料。
答案wood在原文中直接出现，是stove的燃料。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问stove燃烧什么，原文提到stove后说提供wood，所以wood就是答案。

items.prompt: views of old 8 ________ from living room

pairs.p: view of the hills and the monument
pairs.note: 题干说'views of old 8'，原文说'view of the hills and the monument'，但注意题干问的是从living room看到的，而这里的view是从bedroom看到的，所以不是答案。
题干和原文完全一致，帮助你定位到living room相关的描述。
题干中的'old 8'对应原文中的'oldest in the region'，但注意这里描述的是bridge，所以答案应该是bridge。

paraphrase.explain: 通过题干中的'from living room'定位到原文中'from the living room'，然后找到前面描述的'famous stone bridge'，其中'oldest in the region'对应题干中的'old'，所以答案是bridge。

items.prompt: view of hilltop 9 ________ from the bedroom

pairs.p: view of the hills and the monument at the top
pairs.note: 原文将'hilltop'具体化为'the hills and the monument at the top'，其中'monument'是答案。
题干'from the bedroom'对应原文'bedroom window looks'，表示从卧室看出去。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'bedroom window looks in the opposite direction, and has a lovely view of the hills and the monument at the top'，其中'monument'就是答案。

items.prompt: deadline for final payment: end of 10 ________

pairs.note: 题干说'最终付款截止日期'，原文说'三月的最后一天'，意思相同，但用词不同。
'end of' 和 'the last day of' 都表示某段时间的末尾。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问最终付款截止日期是10月的末尾，但原文说'你五月来，所以请在三月的最后一天付款'，因此答案应为March。
